title: Develop production plans for crops or pastures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop production plans for crops or pastures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select plant species and variety

pcs.text: Establish production targets for each crop or pasture type, consistent with marketing and workplace objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish production targets for each crop or pasture type, consistent with marketing and workplace objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish production targets for each crop or pasture type, consistent with marketing and workplace objectives.

pcs.text: Assess and select plant types and varieties for their market potential and gross margin returns for the farm environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and select plant types and varieties for their market potential and gross margin returns for the farm environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and select plant types and varieties for their market potential and gross margin returns for the farm environment.

pcs.text: Select cost-effective cultural practices and rotations, consistent with disease and pest management strategies, available machinery resources and sustainable management of resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select cost-effective cultural practices and rotations, consistent with disease and pest management strategies, available machinery resources and sustainable management of resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select cost-effective cultural practices and rotations, consistent with disease and pest management strategies, available machinery resources and sustainable management of resources.

pcs.text: Assess technology to ensure most efficient performance of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess technology to ensure most efficient performance of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess technology to ensure most efficient performance of operations.

pcs.text: Identify production risks and determine strategies to minimise risk for each plant type selected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify production risks and determine strategies to minimise risk for each plant type selected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify production risks and determine strategies to minimise risk for each plant type selected.

pcs.text: Identify and assess environmental and biosecurity risks, and develop risk controls and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess environmental and biosecurity risks, and develop risk controls and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess environmental and biosecurity risks, and develop risk controls and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Select plant species and variety

elements.title: Establish yield potential and quality specification for crop

pcs.text: Source relevant benchmark yields to assist in setting target yields
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source relevant benchmark yields to assist in setting target yields?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source relevant benchmark yields to assist in setting target yields.

pcs.text: Analyse past production records and determine the key determinants of yield
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse past production records and determine the key determinants of yield?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse past production records and determine the key determinants of yield.

pcs.text: Use available models for calculating water use efficiency or other key determinants of yield to assist in setting target yields
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use available models for calculating water use efficiency or other key determinants of yield to assist in setting target yields?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use available models for calculating water use efficiency or other key determinants of yield to assist in setting target yields.

pcs.text: Establish quality specifications and target yields for all crops or pastures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish quality specifications and target yields for all crops or pastures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish quality specifications and target yields for all crops or pastures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Establish yield potential and quality specification for crop

elements.title: Prepare crop or pasture program

pcs.text: Assess proposed land areas for nutrients, pest and disease status, water reserves, tillage requirements and other factors that may affect crop or pasture production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess proposed land areas for nutrients, pest and disease status, water reserves, tillage requirements and other factors that may affect crop or pasture production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess proposed land areas for nutrients, pest and disease status, water reserves, tillage requirements and other factors that may affect crop or pasture production.

pcs.text: Use records of chemical use for planning to reduce chemical resistance where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use records of chemical use for planning to reduce chemical resistance where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use records of chemical use for planning to reduce chemical resistance where required.

pcs.text: Confirm crop or pasture varieties and plan paddock preparation, planting, fertilising and other treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop or pasture varieties and plan paddock preparation, planting, fertilising and other treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop or pasture varieties and plan paddock preparation, planting, fertilising and other treatments.

pcs.text: Determine optimum timing of planting, applications and treatments, and prepare calendar of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine optimum timing of planting, applications and treatments, and prepare calendar of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine optimum timing of planting, applications and treatments, and prepare calendar of operations.

pcs.text: Determine cash flow and budget for the crop or pasture program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine cash flow and budget for the crop or pasture program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine cash flow and budget for the crop or pasture program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare crop or pasture program

elements.title: Review production plans

pcs.text: Plan logistical arrangements related to harvesting, transportation, marketing and other key production cycle operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan logistical arrangements related to harvesting, transportation, marketing and other key production cycle operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan logistical arrangements related to harvesting, transportation, marketing and other key production cycle operations.

pcs.text: Plan and check machinery and equipment requirements and availability for the production cycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and check machinery and equipment requirements and availability for the production cycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and check machinery and equipment requirements and availability for the production cycle.

pcs.text: Assess workplace health and safety requirements of the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess workplace health and safety requirements of the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess workplace health and safety requirements of the production plan.

pcs.text: Identify and plan labour requirements for the production cycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and plan labour requirements for the production cycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and plan labour requirements for the production cycle.

pcs.text: Identify seed, fertiliser, pest and disease treatments and other input requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify seed, fertiliser, pest and disease treatments and other input requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify seed, fertiliser, pest and disease treatments and other input requirements.

pcs.text: Establish record keeping system to provide data for the analysis of crop or pasture performance, and to meet other statutory requirements, including records of chemical use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish record keeping system to provide data for the analysis of crop or pasture performance, and to meet other statutory requirements, including records of chemical use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish record keeping system to provide data for the analysis of crop or pasture performance, and to meet other statutory requirements, including records of chemical use.

pcs.text: Review and amend crop or pasture production plans, and document final plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and amend crop or pasture production plans, and document final plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and amend crop or pasture production plans, and document final plan.
